<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Generator; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Exception as BaseException; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This interface is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface Exception extends BaseException { }
